name: Jeyandran Venugopal
personalization_hook: Joined Reliance Retail as President & CEO in December 2025, coming from Flipkart where he was CPTO, to accelerate omnichannel growth and lead the company toward a landmark IPO targeted for 2027/28.
hook_explanation: Venugopal is fresh in the role (December 2025) and the IPO preparation context is a highly specific, timely hook.

name: P. Venkatesalu
personalization_hook: Elevated to MD in October 2024 after 15+ years at Trent, overseeing Zudio's explosive expansion to 601 stores by December 2024 — one of India's fastest-scaling value fashion formats.
hook_explanation: Zudio's aggressive store rollout and Venkatesalu's public statement about transformation make this a highly credible hook.

name: Anchit Nayar
personalization_hook: Nykaa entered a 55:45 joint venture with Apparel Group in 2024 to launch Nysaa in the Gulf, marking Nykaa Beauty's first major international expansion.
hook_explanation: The Gulf JV and internal restructuring for fashion eCommerce are specific 2024 moves.

name: Kalyan Krishnamurthy
personalization_hook: Flipkart has increased its AI investment six-fold in 2025, and the company's domicile shift from Singapore to India is the first major step toward an India IPO with draft papers expected in 2026.
hook_explanation: The six-fold AI investment and concrete IPO filing timeline are highly specific public statements by Krishnamurthy himself.

name: Anshul Asawa
personalization_hook: Appointed CEO Designate in January 2025 after a 30-year career at Unilever — where he led digitisation of HUL's sales and distribution — stepping into DMart's lean, tech-light operation.
hook_explanation: Asawa is new to DMart and arrives with a strong digital/distribution transformation background from HUL.

name: Peyush Bansal
personalization_hook: Lenskart filed its DRHP for a ~7,278 crore IPO in 2025, turned profitable, and acquired an 80% stake in Spanish eyewear brand Meller for over 40 million euros.
hook_explanation: Lenskart's simultaneous IPO preparation, European acquisition, and multi-country manufacturing scale-up create highly specific entry points.

name: Vishak Kumar
company: Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands Limited (demerged from ABFRL)
personalization_hook: As of May 2025, took charge as CEO of the newly demerged ABLBL — housing Louis Philippe, Van Heusen, Allen Solly, Peter England — with a goal to double the business and triple cash profits.
hook_explanation: Kumar is leading a brand-new listed entity with aggressive growth targets after the demerger.

name: Vidit Aatrey
personalization_hook: Meesho listed on NSE/BSE in December 2025, India's first major e-commerce IPO — shares surged 95%. In March 2026, stated 'AI will bridge the online-offline divide in India commerce.'
hook_explanation: Aatrey's very recent AI commerce statement plus specific ML/AI talent budget makes this an extremely timely hook.

name: Supam Maheshwari
personalization_hook: FirstCry completed its IPO listing on August 13, 2024 (subscribed 12.2x), becoming one of India's few profitable new-age listed retailers.
hook_explanation: The strong IPO debut and subsequent operational complexity create a nuanced hook for post-IPO governance solutions.

name: Kavindra Mishra
personalization_hook: The 'India Weds with Shoppers Stop' wedding campaign generated 100 crore in its first run (Nov-Dec 2024) and 170 crore in a second phase in early 2025.
hook_explanation: The wedding commerce vertical generating 270 crore across two runs opens conversations around experiential retail.
